calendar.matters:
PETITION Verified Petition For Declaratory Judgement
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Molly White, via Zoom, for Merrill Lynch, Pierce, Fenner & Smith, Inc., Respondents.

There is no appearance by the petitioner or their attorney. The court denies petitioner's Verified Petition for Declaratory Relief without prejudice on the grounds of improper venue.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION Verified Petition For Declaratory Judgement
Off Calendar Mar-16-2022 Continued To Apr-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brandon Oldham, via zoom, for Richard Buell, Petitioner; Molly White, via zoom, for Merril Lynch, Pierce, Fenner & Smith, Inc, Respondents.

The court notes the possible venue issue and confirms with counsel that notice regarding this hearing has not been provided to opposing counsel who have appeared in the Marin County proceedings. Mr. Oldham provides testimony in support of his position regarding venue. The court offers counsel the following options: 1) The court will deny his petition without prejudice or, 2) The court will continue the matter for Mr. Oldham to provide notice to opposing counsel in Marin County of this petition and to provide the court copies of the pleadings filed in the two matters concerning the same trust that are pending in the Marin County Superior Court. Mr. Oldham chooses to accept the court's second option. Ms. White offers brief testimony her position in this matter.

The Verified Revised Petition, etc., is continued to Apr-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.
